allow: Bash(npx shadcn@latest add button card tabs badge skeleton)

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d\)} budget accommodations'\); [print\(f'  - {x[\\"name\\"]} \({x[\\"type\\"]}\) \\${x[\\"price_per_night\\"][\\"min\\"]}-\\${x[\\"price_per_night\\"][\\"max\\"]}/night'\) for x in d]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Currency check: {d[0][\\"currency\\"]} — From ₹{d[0][\\"price_from\\"]:,}'\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Budget accommodations in INR:'\); [print\(f'  ₹{a[\\"price_per_night\\"][\\"min\\"]:,}–₹{a[\\"price_per_night\\"][\\"max\\"]:,}/night — {a[\\"name\\"]}'\) for a in d[:4]]")
